1. ! [X0] : ~(nice_to_animals(X0) & mean_to_animals(X0)) [input(axiom)]

5. pet_owner(tom) [input(axiom)]

7. ~~(grumpy(tom) & mean_to_animals(tom)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. grumpy(tom) & mean_to_animals(tom) [flattening 7]
10. mean_to_animals(tom) [pure predicate removal 8]
11. ! [X0] : (~nice_to_animals(X0) | ~mean_to_animals(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
12. ! [X0] : (nice_to_animals(X0) | ~animal_lover(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
13. ! [X0] : (animal_lover(X0) | ~pet_owner(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
16. ~mean_to_animals(X0) | ~nice_to_animals(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
18. ~animal_lover(X0) | nice_to_animals(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. ~pet_owner(X0) | animal_lover(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. pet_owner(tom) [cnf transformation 5]
21. mean_to_animals(tom) [cnf transformation 10]
22. ~nice_to_animals(tom) [resolution 16,21]
24. animal_lover(tom) [resolution 19,20]
25. nice_to_animals(tom) [resolution 24,18]
26. $false [forward subsumption resolution 25,22]
% SZS output end Proof for positive
% Termination reason: Refutation
